text: Indian Medicinal Plant 'Turmeric' (Botanical: Curcuma longa, Sanskrit: Haridra) is traditionally used for Inflammation, Wound healing, Antioxidant. It contains active phytochemicals such as Curcumin, Demethoxycurcumin, Bisdemethoxycurcumin, which interact with molecular targets including COX-2, LOX, TNF-alpha, Interleukins.
